productDisplayName: John Players Men Printed Blue Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread ribbed collar with a two-button chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidery, flock and graphic print on the front, and has a vented hem Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Rock the dance floor this party season with this T-shirt from john players. The embroidery, flock and graphic print combination on the front ups the style factor of this tee. Team it with jeans and casual shoes.
